paragraph: Single-family homes dominate Oradell, with 17 sales over seven months at a median of $1,050,000. The sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.11, meaning homes are selling above asking, and the median days on market of 13 tells you this is a real seller's market. About 88 percent of homes sold above list price, and sellers are dictating terms here. The range runs wide, from $605,000 to $1,665,000, so pricing matters enormously depending on condition and lot size. Homes that are priced right move fast. There's very little condo or townhouse activity in this market, so you're essentially looking at single-family only. If you're considering Oradell, understand that you're competing in an environment where multiple offer situations are common and inventory is tight. Sellers know what they have.
